title: 函館記念の後に・三つ眼はなくとも

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I did it! I achieved my goal and earned my star!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's bring this star to Goryokaku as an
offering!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Why? Because stars go together, that's why!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Plus... I think it'll be fun to go sightseeing around
the fort... Together, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I have an idea for our next race. I'd like
to run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It was only the compassion from my devoted fans
that got me a spot in the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But this time, I want to actually earn all those
votes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's take all these wishes we've gathered and
bring them to Nakayama at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Do you mean it? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the final climactic battle of the senior
year. With a star as great as Goryokaku, we can't
lose!
